message:
Command `export PATH="$PATH:/home/user/.local/bin"
# Look at nc_chipgen source
NC_CHIPGEN_PATH=$(which nc_chipgen)
echo "Path: $NC_CHIPGEN_PATH"
cat "$NC_CHIPGEN_PATH" 2>/dev/null | head -5
# Find the actual Python source
python3 -c "import nc_chipgen; print(nc_chipgen.__file__)" 2>/dev/null
pip3 show nc_chipgen 2>/dev/null | head -20
find / -name "*.py" -path "*/nc_chipgen*" 2>/dev/null | grep -v __pycache__ | head -20` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "export PATH="$PATH:/home/user/.local/bin"
# Look at nc_chipgen source
NC_CHIPGEN_PATH=$(which nc_chipgen)
echo "Path: $NC_CHIPGEN_PATH"
cat "$NC_CHIPGEN_PATH" 2>/dev/null | head -5
# Find the actual Python source
python3 -c "import nc_chipgen; print(nc_chipgen.__file__)" 2>/dev/null
pip3 show nc_chipgen 2>/dev/null | head -20
find / -name "*.py" -path "*/nc_chipgen*" 2>/dev/null | grep -v __pycache__ | head -20"}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
Path: /home/user/.local/bin/nc_chipgen
#!/usr/local/bin/python3.12
import sys
from nc_chipgen.cli import main
if __name__ == '__main__':
    sys.argv[0] = sys.argv[0].removesuffix('.exe')
/nc/apps/nc_chipgen/__init__.py
Name: nc_chipgen
Version: 0.1.0
Summary: Unified SoC + Padframe chip generator for NativeChips
Home-page: 
Author: 
Author-email: 
License: 
Location: /home/user/.local/lib/python3.12/site-packages
Editable project location: /nc/apps/nc_chipgen
Requires: pyyaml
Required-by: 
/nc/apps/nc_chipgen/__init__.py
/nc/apps/nc_chipgen/__main__.py
/nc/apps/nc_chipgen/chip_rtl_gen.py
/nc/apps/nc_chipgen/cli.py
/nc/apps/nc_chipgen/defaults.py
/nc/apps/nc_chipgen/handoff_to_padconfig.py
/nc/apps/nc_chipgen/openlane_config.py
/nc/apps/nc_chipgen/orchestrator.py
/nc/apps/nc_chipgen/side_assignment.py
/nc/apps/nc_chipgen/synth_area.py

extras.command:
export PATH="$PATH:/home/user/.local/bin"
# Look at nc_chipgen source
NC_CHIPGEN_PATH=$(which nc_chipgen)
echo "Path: $NC_CHIPGEN_PATH"
cat "$NC_CHIPGEN_PATH" 2>/dev/null | head -5
# Find the actual Python source
python3 -c "import nc_chipgen; print(nc_chipgen.__file__)" 2>/dev/null
pip3 show nc_chipgen 2>/dev/null | head -20
find / -name "*.py" -path "*/nc_chipgen*" 2>/dev/null | grep -v __pycache__ | head -20
